# Hey Lola

> Hey Lola is a boutique lifestyle concierge for dog parents. It helps modern dog parents organise their dog's essentials, discover trusted dog-friendly places, and access curated local perks.

For a full briefing, see https://heylola.co/llms-full.txt

Hey Lola is launching first in Miami. New York City and Barcelona are next. The brand is built around four illustrated concierges — Lola, Bruno, Milo and Nuc — who each represent a facet of the Hey Lola experience.

## Brand
- Tagline: Your dog's lifestyle concierge.
- Alternative tagline: A boutique lifestyle concierge for life with your dog.
- Tone: Premium, warm, elegant, clear, helpful, trustworthy, concierge-style, lifestyle-driven. Never childish, never overly technical, no blockchain or crypto language.

## Concierges
- [Lola — Dog Concierge & Founder](https://heylola.co/brand-book/lola): Elegant poodle concierge who sets the tone. Knows the best places.
- [Bruno — Urban Cool Expert](https://heylola.co/brand-book/bruno): Cafés, restaurants, rooftops, Miami cool.
- [Milo — Community Heart](https://heylola.co/brand-book/milo): Warm, trustworthy, family-friendly, the community face.
- [Nuc — Curious Explorer](https://heylola.co/brand-book/nuc): Travel, road trips, dog-friendly weekends beyond the city.

## Pages
- [Home](https://heylola.co/): Hero, cities, membership tiers, concierges and the brand pitch.
- [Hey Lola Club](https://heylola.co/club): Boutique membership with Free / Local / Plus / Black tiers. Free is active; paid tiers are coming soon.
- [Community](https://heylola.co/community): Concierge community feed, leaderboard and Miami Pack.
- [Explore](https://heylola.co/explore): Trusted dog-friendly venues curated by Hey Lola.
- [Partners](https://heylola.co/partners): Verified dog-friendly businesses joining the network.
- [Brand Book](https://heylola.co/brand-book): Logos, palette, typography, voice and the four concierges.
- [Press & Media](https://heylola.co/media): Press contact (hey@heylola.co).
- [About](https://heylola.co/about): The story behind Hey Lola.
- [FAQ](https://heylola.co/faq): Common questions about the platform, memberships and verification.

## Cities
- Miami — Launch city.
- New York City — Coming next.
- Barcelona — Coming next.

## Contact
hey@heylola.co
